issue_summary: Ensure that bad usage will raise an exception.
javadoc_before:
/**
         * @return the unidimensional count after the counter has been
         * incremented by {@code 1}.
         */
javadoc_after:
/**
         * @return the unidimensional count after the counter has been
         * incremented by {@code 1}.
         * @throws NoSuchElementException if {@link #hasNext()} would have
         * returned {@code false}.
         */
